retention_days_text.label: Text retention (days)
retention_days_text.description: Days to keep transcript JSONL entries before pruning. 0 = forever.

tools.name: search_transcript
tools.description: Semantic search over the user's ambient voice transcript history. Use when the user asks 'what did I say about X', 'when did I mention Y', 'did I talk about Z yesterday' — any question about their own prior speech, in any language they speak (EN or DE). Synthesize the matched lines into a natural spoken summary; cite approximate times if useful. Do NOT use this for the general web (use web_search) or for the assistant's own past turns.

query.description: What to search for, paraphrased naturally.

since_iso.description: Optional ISO 8601 datetime (e.g. '2026-05-28T00:00:00') — only return entries on or after this moment.
